title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. pulverosum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. pulverosum is a subspecies of the Hieracium glaucinum plant, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent. Hieracium glaucinum subsp. pulverosum is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
